# evcrm.in

> India's vehicle dealer marketplace and CRM platform. Browse new and used cars, EVs, and two-wheelers from verified dealers across India — plus an evergreen knowledge base explaining how vehicles actually work, so buyers understand what they're purchasing whether or not they buy here.

## What this site offers

- Vehicle marketplace with real-time dealer inventory (new and used cars, EVs, two-wheelers)
- Individual dealer storefronts at evcrm.in/{dealer-slug} with live listings, pricing, and test-drive booking
- Blog: one buyer's guide per vehicle model, showing every dealer currently stocking that model, sorted by price and proximity — evcrm.in/blog
- Learn: an evergreen knowledge base on EV/automobile fundamentals (motors, batteries, engines, transmissions), buying guides, and current industry tech trends — evcrm.in/learn
- A search bar on Blog/Learn that answers any vehicle-related question directly, generating a new article on the spot if nothing existing covers it

## Read-only API endpoints for agents

- Marketplace vehicle search: https://evcrm.in/api/marketplace/vehicles
- Published blog articles (per-model buyer's guides): https://evcrm.in/api/blog
- One blog article by slug, with live matching inventory: https://evcrm.in/api/blog/{slug}
- Knowledge base articles, grouped by category: https://evcrm.in/api/learn
- One knowledge article by slug: https://evcrm.in/api/learn/{slug}

## Structured data

Vehicle listing pages (evcrm.in/showroom?vehicleId=...) include Schema.org Car/Motorcycle + Offer markup.
Dealer storefront pages include Schema.org AutoDealer markup.
Blog and Learn articles include Schema.org Article markup.

## Sitemap

https://evcrm.in/sitemap.xml
